name: Tempeh Fajitas with Pico De Gallo
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Loosely packed cilantro, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Pico de Gallo: Combine the minced garlic, finely chopped onion, tomato, and cilantro in a bowl. Add the serrano pepper and salt to taste. Set aside.
Fajitas: Whisk together the minced garlic and fresh lime juice, then pour over the tempeh in a flat dish. Cover and let marinate in the refrigerator for several hours, turning the tempeh occasionally.
Drain the tempeh. Heat one tablespoon of olive oil in a medium-sized skillet over moderate heat. Brown the tempeh on both sides, adding an additional tablespoon of oil if necessary. Add vegetable stock or water and cover the pan tightly. Steam until the liquid is almost absorbed, then add soy sauce and turn the tempeh to coat. Cover and cook away any remaining liquid. Remove the tempeh from the pan and cut into thin strips.
Wrap tortillas in aluminum foil or place them in a tightly covered pan. Warm in a moderate oven for several minutes. Remove from the oven. Arrange the tempeh strips down the middle of each tortilla, spoon the Pico de Gallo on top, and fold or roll up. Serve immediately with extra sauce. Makes 4 fajitas.
